title: inspection_vendor
description: Structured output of WU-07 Vendor Building Inspection Extraction. Represents fully extracted data from a completed Worksmith pre-filled inspection checklist.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this extraction was performed.

source_doc_url.description: URL or filename of the returned Worksmith checklist document.

address.description: Full property address as written in the inspection checklist header block. Must match site_meta.address (fuzzy).

inspector_name.description: Inspector name and/or firm as stated in the header block.

inspection_date.description: Date of inspection in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

overall_recommendation.description: Inspector's overall site recommendation. Must be one of 4 standard values. Non-standard language is mapped per SKILL.md Rule 8.

deal_killer_flags.description: Responses to the 5 mandatory binary safety questions. Any 'no' triggers an early-exit flag.

safe_dropoff.description: Is the drop-off zone safe for children?

adequate_exits.description: Does the building have 2 or more usable exits?

exit_doors_compliant.description: Are exit doors compliant (width, hardware, swing direction)?

no_hazmat_visible.description: Is there no visible hazardous material (asbestos, lead, mold)?

any_no.description: True if ANY of the 5 deal-killer questions was answered 'no'. Triggers immediate review flag.

sections.description: All 11 inspection section tables. Each section contains an array of item objects.

occupant_load.description: Computed occupant load values from the inspector's Occupant Load Verification section.

net_floor_area_sf.description: Total net floor area (SF) used in occupant load formula. Null if inspector left blank.

total_occupant_load.description: Computed total occupant load (net floor area ÷ code factor). Null if inspector left blank.

net_learning_area_sf.description: Net learning area (SF) used in student capacity formula. Null if inspector left blank.

student_capacity.description: Computed student capacity (net learning area ÷ 20 SF/student or per code). Null if inspector left blank.

cost_estimates.description: All rows from the cost estimate table, extracted as-is. Do not modify figures.

deficiency_summary.description: Computed summary counts and cost totals derived from cost_estimates. Computed by WU-07 — not extracted from the document.

critical_count.description: Number of cost estimate rows with priority = CRITICAL.

important_count.description: Number of cost estimate rows with priority = IMPORTANT.

minor_count.description: Number of cost estimate rows with priority = MINOR.

total_remediation_low.description: Sum of all low_estimate values. Null estimates contribute 0.

total_remediation_high.description: Sum of all high_estimate values. Null estimates contribute 0.

specialist_referrals.description: Specialist referrals found anywhere in the document (section notes, tasks, overall assessment).

reason.description: Verbatim inspector language triggering this referral.

site_specific_tasks.description: D-confidence SIR items that did not map to standard template rows, listed as numbered tasks in the checklist.

task_number.description: Sequential task number as numbered in the document.

finding.description: Inspector's written response. Null if blank.

documentation.description: Photo reference, citation, or document noted by the inspector. Null if blank.

vendor_notes.description: Free-text field for extraction warnings, deal-killer flags, ambiguous language, date discrepancies, missing claim-ids, null estimates, and any other issues noted during extraction.

items.description: All rows extracted from this section's table, in document order.

item.description: Item name from the first column of the table row. Verbatim.

ai_prefill.description: The AI pre-fill text from the second column. Null if the AI had no data for this row.

confirmed.description: Whether the inspector checked the Confirmed checkbox. true = ☑, false = ☐.

finding.description: Inspector's finding from the Finding column. Null if the inspector left it blank.

source_citation.description: Content of the Source/Citation column. Verbatim. Null if blank.

notes.description: Content of the Notes column. Verbatim. Null if blank.

claim_id.description: Claim-id extracted from the HTML comment following this row (format: SIR-XXXX-YYYYMMDD-NNN). Null if no comment present. Never regenerated — preserved exactly as found.

classification.description: Row classification: confirmed = AI and inspector agree + confirmed=true; corrected = AI exists and inspector differs with confirmed=false; new_finding = no AI prefill but inspector added a finding; unverified = both blank.

item.description: Standard cost category. One of 8 values.

description.description: Verbatim description from the table row.

priority.description: Deficiency priority level. Mapped from inspector language per condition-scale.md.

low_estimate.description: Low cost estimate in USD. Null if inspector left blank. Dollar signs and commas stripped before storage.

high_estimate.description: High cost estimate in USD. Null if inspector left blank. Dollar signs and commas stripped before storage.

notes.description: Verbatim notes from the cost estimate table. Null if blank.
